prompt: A lone figure stands in a vast crowd. Their shadow splits into ten silhouettes. Each of those splits into ten more, filling the horizon with cascading shadows. Everyone else casts only a single small shadow. Surreal, painterly, melancholic. No text, no numbers, no charts.
visual_logic: A lone figure's shadow fractures into exponentially multiplying shadows, while those around cast single shadows — you are always outnumbered by your own connections' connections.
